title: seeker
desc: PoC tool demonstrating how browser geolocation can be abused via fake pages and social engineering to accurately locate smartphones

title: FinalRecon
desc: All-in-one web reconnaissance tool that delivers a full target overview — DNS, SSL, WHOIS, subdomains, ports — in one run with minimal dependencies

title: pwnedOrNot
desc: Checks email addresses against HaveIBeenPwned v3 API then searches available public dumps for plaintext passwords from confirmed breaches

title: killcast
desc: PoC tool demonstrating how Chromecast devices can be hijacked by anyone on the network — inspired by the 2019 PewDiePie Chromecast hijack

title: nexfil
desc: Username OSINT tool that checks 350+ websites in seconds with low false positives. Built out of frustration with Sherlock's speed and accuracy

title: FlashSploit
desc: Exploitation framework for ATtiny85 HID devices. Auto-generates Arduino scripts from user input and launches Metasploit listeners where required
